notify-rollup.description: Consolidated premarket Telegram rollup — runs 09:45 UTC Mon-Fri (19:45 AEST)

postclose.description: EOD settlement — runs weekdays 22:00 UTC (08:00 AEST Tue-Sat)

premarket.description: Pre-market ingest + plan — runs weekdays 09:00 UTC (19:00 AEST Mon-Fri)

health-check.description: Weekly strategy health check — runs Fridays 23:00 UTC (09:00 AEST Saturday)

sync_broker_orders.description: Daily broker order sync — runs every 4h to keep broker_orders fresh for reconcile_ledger / reconcile_entry_fills; plus 09:25 AEST Tue-Sat (5 min before reconcile_ledger) to guarantee P1 fill prices. Watchdog alerts if no heartbeat within threshold_hours.

sync_protective_orders.description: Protective order sync (sp500/commodity/sector) — every 15 min; 1h threshold allows network retry margin

execute_approved.description: Execute approved trade plans — 13:15 UTC Mon-Fri (23:15 AEST Mon-Fri, 15 min before US open)

intraday_monitor.description: Intraday risk monitor — every 30 min 15:30-21:30 UTC (01:30-07:30 AEST, US RTH overlap)

compute_daily_risk.description: Daily VaR, vol cones, regime distributions — 13:00 UTC (23:00 AEST)

verify_dual_write.description: Dual-write consistency verifier — 00:00 UTC Tue-Sat (10:00 AEST Tue-Sat). NOTE: ignored by watchdog due to 'verify' prefix in ignored_prefixes — monitored via postclose log instead

atlas-research-window@sp500.description: Nightly research window sweep (sp500) — systemd timer, 13:00 UTC (23:00 AEST)

atlas-research-window@commodity_etfs.description: Nightly research window sweep (commodity_etfs) — systemd timer, 14:00 UTC (00:00 AEST)

atlas-research-window@sector_etfs.description: Nightly research window sweep (sector_etfs) — systemd timer, 15:00 UTC (01:00 AEST)

atlas-research-window@gold_etfs.description: Nightly research window sweep (gold_etfs) — systemd timer, 16:00 UTC (02:00 AEST)

atlas-research-window@treasury_etfs.description: Nightly research window sweep (treasury_etfs) — systemd timer, 17:00 UTC (03:00 AEST)

atlas-research-window@defensive_etfs.description: Nightly research window sweep (defensive_etfs) — systemd timer, 18:00 UTC (04:00 AEST). NEEDS VERIFICATION: timer OnCalendar not confirmed.

atlas-research-window@crypto.description: Nightly research window sweep (crypto) — systemd timer, 19:00 UTC (05:00 AEST)

check_live_research_divergence.description: Daily live-vs-research Sharpe divergence monitor — 20:30 UTC (06:30 AEST). Per audit 2026-05-06 Rec 4.

eod_settlement.description: End-of-day settlement (stop/TP detection, exit recording) — 08:00 UTC Tue-Sat (postclose via pi-cron.sh)

reconcile_ledger.description: Daily SQLite ledger reconciliation vs broker state — 09:30 UTC Tue-Sat

healthcheck_pipelines.description: Daily pipeline health checks (data ingest, SQLite integrity, config validity) — 22:00 UTC
